=== Content-mapped files ===

//// [Component.vue] (ScriptKind: ScriptKindTS, ContentMapper: [.vue])
--- Original ---
<template>
  <div>{{ greeting }}</div>
</template>

<script lang="ts">
const greeting: number = "not a number";
export { greeting };
</script>

--- Transformed ---
const greeting: number = "not a number";
export { greeting };

=== Diagnostics ===

Component.vue:6:7 - error TS2322: Type 'string' is not assignable to type 'number'.

6 const greeting: number = "not a number";
        ~~~~~~~~
